qaLayers.label: AI-assisted draft
qaLayers.notes: Term choices are drafted from OpenAI Academy wording and public OpenAI developer documentation.

qaLayers.label: Google Translate baseline
qaLayers.notes: Used to identify where runtime machine translation needs glossary correction.

qaLayers.label: X public translation cross-check
qaLayers.notes: Manual, link-backed comparison against public OpenAI-related posts on X. This is a real-world machine-translation signal, not an official OpenAI translation source.

qaLayers.label: Community/native review
qaLayers.notes: Locale reviewers can improve JSON values while parity checks protect the source key set.

glossaries.notes: AI-drafted premium glossary seed. Needs X translation cross-check, community review, and native review before reviewed status.
